import pytest
from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_preserves_duplicates():
    # Test case with duplicates that exposes the bug:
    # The buggy version filters with `x > pivot`, dropping equal values
    arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    result = quicksort(arr)
    # The sorted result should have the same length and contain all elements
    expected = sorted(arr)
    assert len(result) == len(arr), f"Length mismatch: got {len(result)}, expected {len(arr)}"
    assert result == expected, f"Sorted result incorrect: got {result}, expected {expected}"
